input.prompt: Content portfolio ROI studio control room with content bubbles, acquisition-retention frontier, and strategic investment frontier curves. Premium media-analytics style, deep slate and cyan highlights, no logos.

Cinematic content ROI diagram: bubble matrix (cost vs LTV), acquisition vs retention Pareto frontier, and budget sensitivity sliders. Editorial dark background with subtle film grain, warm amber highlights, no logos or text blocks.
Cinematic analytics overlay with film-grain texture, ROI frontier arcs, acquisition-retention trails, and studio allocation markers for dark editorial dashboard. No logos, no text blocks.
